ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the promotion */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions that might affect sales */,
  "inventory_levels" INTEGER /* Inventory levels at the time of sale */,
  "returns_count" INTEGER /* Number of returns */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Total amount of returns */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales after returns */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total units sold */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price per unit */,
  "avg_base_price" REAL /* Average base price per unit */,
  "avg_abs_discount" REAL /* Average absolute discount per unit */,
  "avg_rel_discount" REAL /* Average relative discount per unit */,
  "total_feature" INTEGER /* Total feature advertising count */,
  "total_display" INTEGER /* Total special display count */,
  "total_tpr_only" INTEGER /* Total TPR only count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales metrics */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales metrics */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the promotion */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue */,
  "avg_discount" REAL /* Average discount */,
  "feature_advertising_roi" REAL /* Return on investment for feature advertising */,
  "special_display_roi" REAL /* Return on investment for special display */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit */,
  "cost_of_goods_sold" REAL /* Cost of goods sold */,
  "customer_retention_rate" REAL /* Customer retention rate */,
  "new_customer_count" INTEGER /* Number of new customers */,
  "repeat_customer_count" INTEGER /* Number of repeat customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES sales_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES sales_data ("month"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_metrics_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("store_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the day is a holiday
Weather conditions that might affect sales
Inventory levels at the time of sale
Return on investment for feature advertising
Return on investment for special display
